headline: Three-Peat: Momentum Named Agency of the Year Again
summary: NEW YORK, March 27, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Global experience agency, Momentum, has been named Experiential Agency of the Year by Campaign US for the third consecutive year. Campaign US cited “While AI and tech tools captured the lion’s share of conversation and investment for much of the industry over the past year, Momentum stands out for staying laser-focused on what truly matters: the people.
